name: @danielhaim/titlecaser
description: A powerful utility for transforming text to title case with support for multiple style guides and extensive customization options.

scripts.build: npm run build:dist && npm run build:docs-assets && npm run build:docs-data
scripts.build:docs-assets: rm -rf docs/assets/js/full docs/assets/js/lite docs/assets/js/titlecaser.amd.js docs/assets/js/titlecaser.esm.js docs/assets/js/titlecaser.module.js && mkdir -p docs/assets/js && cp -R dist/full dist/lite docs/assets/js/
scripts.build:docs: npm run build:docs-data && cd docs && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.build-docs: npm run build:docs-data && cd docs && bundle install && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.release:current: npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "Release: v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git tag -a v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') -m "Release v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "Patch Release: v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git tag -a v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') -m "Patch Release v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "Major Release: v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git tag -a v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') -m "Major Release v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "Minor Release: v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git tag -a v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') -m "Minor Release v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version')" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
